user.title: Set up Irrigation Sequencer
user.description: Choose 2 to 10 valves or smart plugs to control as irrigation zones.

error.too_few_zones: At least 2 zones must be selected.
error.too_many_zones: A maximum of 10 zones can be selected.

init.title: Reconfigure zones
init.description: Choose 2 to 10 valves or smart plugs to control as irrigation zones. Per-zone duration and the sequence order are kept for zones that stay selected.

error.too_few_zones: At least 2 zones must be selected.
error.too_many_zones: A maximum of 10 zones can be selected.
